calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Staci Miller for and with Xian Fu Lui.

This matter was continued to August 25, 2010 by the Probate Examiner/Court. Ms. Miller stated that if the matter is not heard today, that it would create extreme hardship for her Client. In addition, Ms. Miller stated that her Client had an immigration matter scheduled for tomorrow morning, that continuing the matter would not provide the Court with more information, that the Husband's consent is not required under section 309 of the Family Code and that neither Party denies the marriage. The Court spoke of the pending dissolution matter. Ms. Miller stated that Mr. Chung (Husband) withdrew his objection to the validity of the marriage, that she had a document from the Husband's Attorney as to the above, and that she sent a stipulation to Counsel but had not received it back. The Court stated that the matter was to remain continued, that it would accept a declaration from the Husband"s Counsel stating that the Husband does not object to the Petition to Establish Fact Marriage and that it would sign the order granting the petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Off the record: The Court received the requested declaration from Mr. Chung's Attorney and signed the order granting the petition.
